title: Data Science & Big Data
description: Learn to extract insights from massive datasets. Covers Big Data 3Vs, Hadoop, Tableau, and more.

title: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
description: Explore the future of tech with neural networks, NLP, and AI applications like ChatGPT and self-driving cars.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Protect systems and networks from digital attacks. Understand the CIA Triad, malware, and ethical hacking basics.

title: DevOps & Software Testing
description: Master CI/CD pipelines, containerization with Docker, and automated testing to streamline software delivery.

title: Cloud Computing
description: Build scalable solutions. Discover IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, virtualization, and modern cloud architecture models.

title: Full Stack Web Development & UI/UX
description: Design and code web applications end-to-end. Master HTML, CSS, React, backend concepts, and user experience.
